'''Defender Wing''' was a bomber [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

==History==
Formed in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Defender Wing was composed of three [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing]] squadrons under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm]].

General Salm trained [[Champion Squadron|Champion]], [[Guardian Squadron|Guardian]], and [[Warden Squadron]]s on [[Folor]] alongside the reformed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], which Salm was charged with overseeing. A rivalry developed between Salm's green pilots and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] aces after their embarrassing defeat by the Rogues during a training exercise. To add insult to injury, the Rogues arranged for their new squadron crest to be displayed on the Y-wings main display when they were "shot down." This was later made up for when the Rogue Squadron [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]], [[M-3PO (Emtrey)|Emtrey]], delivered a gross of new flight suits to Defender Wing. Two weeks after the exercise, the wing was made fully operational by Admiral Ackbar.

The first major operation for the wing was the [[Defense of Vladet|Battle of Vladet]], the [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]] capital. During the operation, the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Expeditious]]'' and the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] [[Ravager (Lancer-class)|''Ravager'']] ambushed the starfighters. ''Ravager'' would have destroyed the Y-wings, but quick thinking by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and a torpedo volley from Warden Squadron destroyed ''Ravager''.

The wing also participated in the [[First Battle of Borleias]]. During the battle, the wing was assigned to the [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] ''[[Mon Valle]]''. The wing was ordered to pull out by General [[Laryn Kre'fey]], but disobeyed orders and stayed close to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]''. When the Imperials sprang an ambush, Salm ordered the wing back in, destroying a number of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] and rescuing the Rogues. A second attempt at taking Borleias was more successful, with the arrival of Defender Wing and a second wing of fighters covering Lieutenant [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]] and his commando unit as they infiltrated the base and captured it.

Defender Wing also participated in the seizure of one of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s station at [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. Beginning with that battle, Guardian Squadron used [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] in the place of their older Y-wings.
